description: A drilling engineer designs a well plan for a new offshore exploration well, including casing design and trajectory.

nodes.task_description: Using offset well data, determine the required casing points and design the casing strings.

expected_outcome.value: A safe and compliant casing design is generated.

nodes.task_description: Plan the optimal well trajectory to intersect multiple reservoir targets while avoiding hazards.

expected_outcome.value: An efficient and safe well path is designed.

nodes.task_description: Generate the final drilling program document, including all operational steps and risk assessments.

expected_outcome.value: A complete and approved drilling program is ready for operations.
